TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR, PETITIONER SMALL PROPERTY OWNERS OF SAN FRANCISCO INSTITUTE'S MOTION TO AUGMENT THE CERTIFIED ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD OF PROCEEDINGS WAS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 8/26/2014. THE COURT ORDERED TAKEN THE MATTER OFF THE SUBMISSION LIST AND CONTINUED THE HEARING TO 8/28/14 AT 10:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 503 TO ANNOUNCE ITS DECISION. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO AUGMENT IS GRANTED AS TO THE NEW DOCUMENTS AND DENIED AS TO THE REDACTED DOCUMENTS. THE COURT FINDS PRIVILEGE IN THE DOCUMENTS BUT DETERMINES THAT IT IS NOT A WAIVER. THE RESPECTIVE COUNSEL WILL SUBMIT A STIPULATED PROPOSED ORDER FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, MATTER NOT REPORTED (503/TLJ)

CEQA CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON APR-22-2014, THE COURT AND COUNSEL DISCUSSED THE STATUS OF THE CASE. THE COURT ORDERED AS FOLLOWS: 1) A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET WITH COURT SETTLEMENT OFFICER, PANG LY, ON MAY 28, 2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 603. PARTIES ARE TO SUBMIT MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENTS BY 5:00 PM ON MAY 23, 2014. 2) THE WRIT HEARING IS SET FOR JULY 10, 2014 AT 1:30 PM AND JULY 11, 2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 503. PARTIES ARE TO SUBMIT A STIPULATION AND ORDER REGARDING AN AGREED BRIEFING SCHEDULE, WHICH INDICATES PLAINTIFF'S FINAL REPLY DUE BY JUNE 26, 2014. 3) A FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET ON MAY 21, 2014 AT 2:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 503. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, NOT REPORTED (503/TLJ)
